title: Xtra Garlicky Middle Eastern Purple Sprouting Broccoli Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy vegetarian dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with a strong garlic taste and a Middle Eastern twist.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan charcoal grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, sumac, salt, and black pepper.
Add the minced garlic to the bowl and mix well.
Add the trimmed purple sprouting broccoli to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic mixture.
Thread the broccoli onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, with pita bread on the side if desired.
Garnish with additional sumac and lemon wedges if desired.
